SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.ports

Class BrokerRegistrationInboundPort

java.lang.Object
java.rmi.server.RemoteObject
java.rmi.server.RemoteServer
java.rmi.server.UnicastRemoteObject
fr.sorbonne_u.components.AbstractPort
fr.sorbonne_u.components.ports.AbstractInboundPort
fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.ports.BrokerRegistrationInboundPort
All Implemented Interfaces:
fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.ComponentInterface, fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.OfferedCI, fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.RequiredCI, fr.sorbonne_u.components.ports.InboundPortI, fr.sorbonne_u.components.ports.PortI, RegistrationCI, Serializable, Remote
public class BrokerRegistrationInboundPort extends fr.sorbonne_u.components.ports.AbstractInboundPort implements RegistrationCI
Port inbound exposant le service d'enregistrement et de souscription du broker via l'interface RegistrationCI.

Propriétaire : Broker (les méthodes castent getOwner() vers ce type concret).

Convention : les exceptions métier déclarées sur la CI sont rejetées telles quelles ; toute autre Exception technique est encapsulée dans une RemoteException. : les méthodes void asynchrones (unregister(String), subscribe(String,String,MessageFilterI), unsubscribe(String,String)) sont dispatchées sur l'executor de réception du broker pour libérer immédiatement le thread RMI ; les exceptions levées dans la lambda sont logguées (le contrat est asynchrone, l'appelant ne peut pas les observer).

See Also:

    register on the publication/subscription system passing the URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI on which the user component will receive its messages; the method returns an URI of an inbound port offering the component interface PublishingCI on which the user component will publish its messages.

  • Constructor Details

    • BrokerRegistrationInboundPort

      public BrokerRegistrationInboundPort(fr.sorbonne_u.components.ComponentI owner) throws Exception
      Constructeur sans URI explicite (BCM4Java en génère une).
      Parameters:
      owner - composant propriétaire — doit être un Broker.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • BrokerRegistrationInboundPort

      public BrokerRegistrationInboundPort(String uri, fr.sorbonne_u.components.ComponentI owner) throws Exception
      Crée le port inbound avec une URI explicite et déterministe (Phase C.3). Permet au broker de dériver l'URI du port d'enregistrement depuis son URI de réflexion, supprimant le besoin d'un statique global.
      Parameters:
      uri - URI à publier pour ce port.
      owner - composant propriétaire — doit être un Broker.
      Throws:
      Exception

  • Method Details

    • registered

      public boolean registered(String receptionPortURI) throws Exception
      Description copied from interface: RegistrationCI
      return true if receptionPortURI has already been registered, otherwise false.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Specified by:
      registered in interface RegistrationCI
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      Returns:
      true if receptionPortURI has already been registered, otherwise false.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.
      See Also:
      • RegistrationCI.registered(String)

    • registered

      public boolean registered(String receptionPortURI, RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc) throws Exception
      Description copied from interface: RegistrationCI
      return true if receptionPortURI has already been registered with service class rc, otherwise false.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 pre    rc != null
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Specified by:
      registered in interface RegistrationCI
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      rc - the registration class.
      Returns:
      true if receptionPortURI has already been registered with service class rc, otherwise false.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.
      See Also:
      • RegistrationCI.registered(String, RegistrationClass)

    • register

      public String register(String receptionPortURI, RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc) throws Exception
      Description copied from interface: RegistrationCI
      register on the publication/subscription system passing the URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI on which the user component will receive its messages; the method returns an URI of an inbound port offering the component interface PublishingCI on which the user component will publish its messages.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 pre    rc != null
 post   registered(receptionPortURI)
 post   registered(receptionPortURI, rc)
      Specified by:
      register in interface RegistrationCI
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      rc - the required registration class.
      Returns:
      an URI of an inbound port offering the component interface PublishingCI.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.
      See Also:
      • RegistrationCI.register(String, RegistrationClass)

    • modifyServiceClass

      public String modifyServiceClass(String receptionPortURI, RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc) throws Exception
      Description copied from interface: RegistrationCI
      upgrade or degrade the registration to the class rc, returning a new URI of an inbound port offering the component interface PublishingCI.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 pre    rc != null
 post   registered(receptionPortURI, rc)
      Specified by:
      modifyServiceClass in interface RegistrationCI
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      rc - the required registration class.
      Returns:

      return true if receptionPortURI has subscribed to channel, otherwise false.

 pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Specified by:
      subscribed in interface RegistrationCI

    • subscribe

      public void subscribe(String receptionPortURI, String channel, MessageFilterI filter) throws Exception
      Souscription asynchrone : dispatchée sur l'executor de réception . L'appelant ne voit pas les exceptions métier (logguées).
      Specified by:
      subscribe in interface RegistrationCI
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      channel - name of an existing channel.
      filter - filter that accepts the message the component wants to receive.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.
      See Also:
      • RegistrationCI.subscribe(String, String, MessageFilterI)

      public boolean modifyFilter(String receptionPortURI, String channel, MessageFilterI filter) throws Exception

      modify the filter placed on channel to filter.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 pre    filter != null
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Specified by:
      modifyFilter in interface RegistrationCI
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      channel - name of an existing channel.
      filter - filter that accepts the message the component wants to receive.
      Returns:
      true if the modification has been performed, otherwise false.
